details.test: Task 1: Book earliest morning new-patient evaluation (Mar 10–14, 2026)
Task 2: Select cheapest 6-session knee pain package under $500
Task 3: Choose back-pain specialist with more experience and start booking back evaluation
Task 4: Register two spots in an evening Posture & Core class in April 2026
Task 5: Calculate out-of-pocket cost for initial eval with BlueCross Basic Plan
Task 6: Save three recent shoulder-related blog articles to reading list
Task 7: Submit new-patient appointment request via contact form
Task 8: Subscribe to clinic newsletter with specific interests and weekly frequency
Task 9: Add three beginner, no-equipment knee exercises to favorites
